rationale_source: TT=private mortgage: Vienna name suggests private-mortgage focus. ARCHITECTURE-AMENDMENT-CANDIDATE per DECISIONS-NEEDED.md #4 — spec captures expected behavior assuming uniform treatment with bank-lender refis.

transaction_type.rationale: F1.TT private-variant. Per Layer 3 #4 (a) placeholder: treated uniformly with bank-lender refis; private-specific workflow surfaces in Phase 5.

mortgage_position.rationale: F1.MP — private as 2nd behind existing bank 1st.

combined_ltv_high.rationale: Combined LTV 95% ($380k 1st + $425k private 2nd / $850k) — extreme band per Layer 3 #14 (b) escalate territory.

workflow_state.rationale: F2.AC + admin exception review per cross-product Layer 3 #14 + #4.

must_include.rationale: Private + extreme combined LTV warrants admin attention.

layer3_pending_decisions.phase5_placeholder: spec assumes uniform treatment with bank refis
